rationale: The cited paper is directly about the “licensing effect in consumer choice,” which is a focal construct in the citing paper (PLRM explicitly models persistence-promoting vs. licensing-promoting responses after subgoal success). Given the citing paper’s stated extension of prior subgoal-success/licensing work and the strong construct overlap with the cited paper’s mechanism evidence (self-concept-based licensing in sequential decisions), this is plausibly foundational rather than an incidental mention.
